title: Part 2 – Question-Réponse : l'abonnement logiciel
instructions: Écoutez la question et les trois réponses possibles. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.
audioText: Why wasn't the software subscription renewed on time? (A) There was a delay in budget approval. (B) The software is updated every year. (C) I use it for project management.

choices: There was a delay in budget approval.
The software is updated every year.
I use it for project management.
questions.explanation: "Why wasn't it renewed?" demande une raison. (A) explique le retard budgétaire. (B) décrit le cycle de mise à jour, (C) explique un usage personnel.
